title: 3D zone gating and passive ViewCube sync
description: Keep 3D structure-only by default by rendering zone volumes only when the additive zone overlay is enabled. Add X/Y/Z axes to the ViewCube and make it passively mirror the OrbitControls camera orientation without installing custom gizmo drag controls.
completion_notes: Changed src/views3d/three-view.ts so scene3d zone volumes are gated by ctx.options.overlays including zone. The ViewCube now renders three passive X/Y/Z axes and updates its CSS transform from the inverse camera quaternion each animation frame. Removed the custom gizmo drag control after human feedback; camera movement remains normal OrbitControls on the canvas, with existing face-click snap behavior retained.
verification: Browser check on http://127.0.0.1:4174/: with zone unchecked, 3D has one canvas, one ViewCube, three axes, zero zone SVG labels, cube transform changes when the main canvas is dragged, and no console errors.
handoff: Continue TASK-009 with 3D overlay visual parity and camera/gizmo polish. Do not add custom drag behavior to the gizmo unless explicitly requested again; treat it as an orientation helper plus face-click snap.
